assets.description: A safe Starville diagnostic crate used when no eligible visual source can load.
Seam-safe isometric meadow grass with a restrained painted texture.
A compatible grass variation with tiny clover flecks for repeated areas.
Garden Dirt rendered on the canonical 96 by 48 isometric tile plane.
Lantern Stone Path rendered on the canonical 96 by 48 isometric tile plane.
Lantern Plaza Stone rendered on the canonical 96 by 48 isometric tile plane.
Brook Water rendered on the canonical 96 by 48 isometric tile plane.
Willow Bridge Deck rendered on the canonical 96 by 48 isometric tile plane.
A warm isometric cottage with a deep roof, lit windows, and readable doorway.
Lantern Notice Board with readable sign geometry and no baked interface text.
A slender village lantern with warm restrained glow and a stable post base.
A low willow fence segment with distinct posts and a narrow collision base.
A layered evergreen with a narrow trunk collision and soft canopy highlights.
A rounded maple tree with moss, amber, and sage foliage clusters.
Round-leaf Bush with a compact readable silhouette and soft upper-left light.
Moonbell Flowers with a compact readable silhouette and soft upper-left light.
Mossy Waystone with a compact readable silhouette and soft upper-left light.
Willow Chair with four authored isometric directions and a stable placement base.
A sturdy willow workbench with visible vice, tools, shelf, and timber grain.
Round-leaf Planter with four authored isometric directions and a stable placement base.
